resposta:
solution: ```class Solution:
    def countSegments(self, s: str) -> int:
        return len(s.split())```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n)
space complexity: O(n)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: Uses Python's built-in split() which splits on any run of whitespace and discards empty strings, giving the exact segment count in one line.
